title: Create a new codemod transform
description: Scaffold a new codemod transform with tests, fixtures, and manifest integration.

version.description: Semantic version for this transform (e.g. '3.0.0'). The transform applies to upgrades to or past this version.

extensions.description: Comma-separated file extensions to target (e.g. 'tsx,html,vue'). No leading dots.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this transform does

includeFixtures.description: Create example fixture files for testing (recommended)
